message:
feat(wal): add background epoch ticker thread (D1.5)

Implements the background epoch ticker thread that advances epochs
at the configured interval (default 10ms) and flushes per-thread WAL
buffers to disk.

Key changes:
- Refactor ParallelWalCoordinator to use Arc for shared state
  (inner EpochOrderCoordinator and running flag)
- Implement start() to spawn named "wal-epoch-ticker" thread
- Add epoch_ticker_loop() that runs advance_epoch_and_wait + flush_epoch
- Add is_running() method for checking ticker state
- Add tests for ticker start/stop and epoch advancement

The ticker implements the Silo/Aether group commit pattern where
transactions submit to per-thread buffers without locking, and a
background thread periodically seals/flushes all buffers together.

TODOs for follow-up:
- D1.6: Write flushed batch to segment files
- D1.7: Update recovery to replay segments
- Track actually-active slots to avoid waiting for unused slots

Epic: bd-3wop3 (Eliminate 8-16 Thread Contention)
Bead: bd-3wop3.1 (Per-thread WAL buffers + epoch group commit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
